# Tasks.ForbiddenNotificationMethods field

The notification methods that MUST NOT be used to convey task state (§25.9, §25.10, R-25.9-a, R-25.10-g): `notifications/progress`, `notifications/message`, and `notifications/cancelled`. Task state is conveyed ONLY via `tasks/get` and `notifications/tasks`, and `tasks/cancel` is the ONLY task-cancellation mechanism.

```csharp
public static readonly IReadOnlySet<string> ForbiddenNotificationMethods;
```
